BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: Represents a single blog post on the SnipBlog website, designed for management via an admin dashboard and eventual rendering via MDX.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BlogPost entity.

title.description: The main title of the blog post.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the blog post, derived from the title, used for permalinks.

contentMdx.description: The full content of the blog post, written in MDX format.

excerpt.description: A brief summary or snippet of the blog post content, often displayed in listings.

heroImageUrl.description: The URL of the hero image displayed prominently at the top of the blog post.

heroImageAltText.description: Alternative text for the hero image, crucial for accessibility and SEO.

images.description: List of supporting images uploaded for this post.

publishDate.description: The date and time when the blog post was first published.

updatedDate.description: The date and time when the blog post was last updated.

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the blog post is publicly visible (true) or a draft (false).

authorId.description: Reference to the Author who wrote this blog post. (Relationship: Author 1:N BlogPost)

tagIds.description: References to tags associated with this blog post for categorization. (Relationship: Tag N:N BlogPost)

QuickNote.title: QuickNote
QuickNote.description: Represents a technical snippet or quick reference note.

Author.title: Author
Author.description: Represents an author who can publish blog posts on SnipBlog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Author entity.

name.description: The full name of the author.

bio.description: A short biographical description of the author.

email.description: The email address of the author (not used for authentication).

profileImageUrl.description: The URL to the author's profile picture.

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Represents a categorization tag that can be applied to blog posts for better organization and searchability.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

name.description: The human-readable name of the tag (e.g., 'Next.js', 'Web Development').

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the tag, derived from its name.

definition.description: Collection to define users with administrative privileges.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the administrative user.

definition.description: Stores blog posts that are publicly visible.

params.name: blogPostId
params.description: The unique identifier for the published blog post.

definition.description: Stores technical snippets that are publicly visible.

params.name: noteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the published note.

definition.description: Stores technical snippets that are in draft status.

params.name: noteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the draft note.

params.name: authorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the author.

definition.description: Stores categorization tags for blog posts.

params.name: tagId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tag.
